title: Preparation of 0.5 M EDTA (0.5 L)
author: Haven Himmighoefer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ks7cwhn
materials: Ethylenediamine Tetraacetic Acid Disodium Salt Dihydrate

steps.title: Add Deionized Water
steps.instruction: Fill 0.5 L bottle with 300mL of deionized water.

steps.title: Add EDTA Disodium Salt
steps.instruction: Add 95.05 g of Ethylenediamine Tetraacetic Acid Disodium Salt Dihydrate to the water and mix. The pH will be about 3 at this points. The pH needs to be at 8.

steps.title: Adjust pH
steps.instruction: Add NaOH pellets until the pH is at 8. This will be about 105 pellets. Can check if at 8 with pH machine or with pH paper.

steps.title: Bring to Final Volume
steps.instruction: Once at pH 8, fill to 500 mL.

steps.title: Autoclave Solution
steps.instruction: Autoclave under setting 12 with water in the container to prevent over boiling.
